summary: Iteration 7 - Multi-tenant SaaS Platform Major Update Testing Complete. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI correctly implements 5 role-based dashboards (Owner, Manager, Seller, Cashier, Stock Manager), QR code auto-generation with print support, stock approval workflow, and activity audit log.

backend: Owner can list employees via GET /api/owner/employees ✅
Owner can create employee with role via POST /api/owner/employees ✅
Owner can create employees with all 4 roles (manager, seller, cashier, stock_manager) ✅
Product creation auto-generates QR code (POST /api/products returns qr_code field) ✅
QR print endpoint (GET /api/products/{id}/qr-print) returns QR data ✅
QR scan endpoint (GET /api/products/{id}/qr-scan) returns product info (public) ✅
Stock requests filter by status works ✅
Activity log (GET /api/owner/activity-log) returns activities with user/role/timestamp ✅
Products have buy_price and sell_price fields ✅
Create product with buy_price and sell_price works ✅
frontend: Owner Dashboard shows KPIs: Ventes Aujourd'hui, Revenus Mensuels, Produits, Employes ✅
Owner Dashboard shows Employee Management with search and add button ✅
Owner Dashboard shows Activity Log (Journal d'Activite) ✅
Owner Dashboard shows Quick Links: Produits, Stock, Ventes, Finances, Retours ✅
Owner can open Add Employee dialog with role selection (manager, seller, cashier, stock_manager) ✅
Manager Dashboard shows 'Supervision et gestion operationnelle' ✅
Manager Dashboard shows Stock Approval Requests with Approuver/Rejeter buttons ✅
Manager sidebar shows: Dashboard, Produits, Stock, Approbations, Employes, Retours (NO POS) ✅
Seller Dashboard shows 'Mon Espace' with performance stats ✅
Seller Dashboard has 'Ouvrir POS' button ✅
Seller sidebar shows: Mon Espace, Ventes (POS), Produits, Retours, Mes Performances ✅
Cashier Dashboard shows 'Caisse' with 'Ouvrir POS' button ✅
Cashier sidebar shows limited menu: Ma Caisse, Caisse (POS), Mes Performances ✅
Stock Manager Dashboard shows 'Gestion des Stocks' with products and stock levels ✅
Stock Manager Dashboard shows 'Mes Demandes' with request history ✅
Stock Manager sidebar shows: Mon Stock, Stock, Produits (NO POS) ✅
Products page shows QR, Nom, Categorie, Prix Achat, Prix Vente, Stock columns ✅
Products page has QR code thumbnails and modal with print button ✅
Add Product form has Prix Achat and Prix Vente fields ✅
Product search functionality works ✅

critical_code_review_comments: Role-based dashboard dispatch in DashboardPage.jsx correctly routes to 5 different dashboards based on user role
DashboardLayout.jsx sidebar filtering correctly shows different menu items per role with section groups
Stock approval workflow correctly implemented: stock_manager creates request → manager/owner approves → stock updated
Activity logging correctly captures all actions with user_name, user_role, timestamp, and details
QR code auto-generation on product creation works correctly with base64 PNG storage
Products correctly support buy_price and sell_price fields for profit calculation

owner_dashboard.detail: Strategic view with KPIs, employee management (CRUD), activity log, quick links. NO POS selling.

manager_dashboard.detail: Supervision view with stock approval requests (approve/reject). NO POS selling.

seller_dashboard.detail: POS-focused view with performance stats and 'Ouvrir POS' button.

cashier_dashboard.detail: Cash register view with 'Ouvrir POS' button and limited menu.

stock_manager_dashboard.detail: Stock management with products list, stock levels, and modification request capability.

sidebar_role_filtering.detail: Each role sees only their allowed menu items. Manager/Stock Manager have NO POS access.

qr_code_auto_generation.detail: POST /api/products returns qr_code field with base64 PNG.

qr_code_print.detail: GET /api/products/{id}/qr-print returns product_name, sell_price, category, qr_code.

stock_approval_workflow.detail: Stock manager creates request → Manager/Owner approves/rejects → Stock updated and activity logged.

activity_audit_log.detail: GET /api/owner/activity-log returns all activities with user_name, user_role, action, details, timestamp.

products_pricing.detail: Products have buy_price and sell_price fields. Table shows Prix Achat and Prix Vente columns.

employee_management.detail: Owner can create employees with 4 roles via POST /api/owner/employees. Block/activate/delete work.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 role-based dashboards verified working. Stock approval workflow tested end-to-end. QR code generation and print/scan endpoints working. Activity audit log captures all actions. Products support buy_price/sell_price. All test credentials above are valid and working.
